MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER WILLIAM M. HART'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

APPEARANCES: Gil N. Peles, Esq. of Proskauer Rose LLP 310/557-2900 for petitioner & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.
